restaurant.name: Bosphorus Berlin
restaurant.tagline: Authentische türkische Küche im Herzen Berlins

reservation_policy.walk_ins: welcome for 1-3 guests, subject to availability
reservation_policy.cancellation_policy: Please cancel at least 24 hours in advance
reservation_policy.large_group_policy: Groups of 6+ require a €15 per person deposit via Stripe

special_features: Live Bağlama music on Friday and Saturday evenings (20:00–22:00)
Private dining room for groups up to 20 people
restaurant.parking: Public parking available at Torstraße Parkhaus, 3 minute walk. Tram M8/M10 stop directly outside.

starters.name: Mezze Platte
starters.description: A generous selection of our finest cold meze: hummus, cacık (yoghurt with cucumber and dill), patlıcan salatası (smoked aubergine), acılı ezme (spicy tomato paste), olives, and warm pide bread.
starters.description_de: Eine großzügige Auswahl unserer feinsten Mezze: Hummus, Cacık, Patlıcan Salatası, Acılı Ezme, Oliven und warmes Pide-Brot.

starters.name: Hummus
starters.description: Classic creamy chickpea hummus with tahini, lemon, garlic, topped with olive oil and paprika. Served with warm pide bread.
starters.description_de: Cremiger Kichererbsenhummus mit Tahini, Zitrone, Knoblauch, Olivenöl und Paprika. Mit warmem Pide-Brot.

starters.name: Sigara Böreği
starters.description: Crispy fried filo pastry rolls filled with white cheese and fresh herbs. Served with yoghurt dipping sauce.
starters.description_de: Knusprige gebratene Yufka-Rollen gefüllt mit weißem Käse und frischen Kräutern. Mit Joghurt-Dipsauce.

starters.name: Çoban Salatası
starters.description: Fresh shepherd's salad with diced tomatoes, cucumber, green pepper, red onion, parsley, sumac, and a light lemon-olive oil dressing.
starters.description_de: Frischer Hirtensalat mit Tomaten, Gurken, Paprika, Zwiebeln, Petersilie, Sumach und Zitronen-Olivenöl-Dressing.

starters.name: Mercimek Çorbası
starters.description: Traditional Turkish red lentil soup with cumin, mint butter, and a squeeze of lemon. Velvety smooth and warming.
starters.description_de: Traditionelle türkische rote Linsensuppe mit Kreuzkümmel, Minzbutter und Zitrone. Samtig und wärmend.

starters.name: Lahmacun
starters.description: Thin crispy flatbread topped with spiced minced lamb, onion, tomato, and parsley. Served with fresh salad and lemon.
starters.description_de: Dünnes knuspriges Fladenbrot mit gewürztem Lammhack, Zwiebeln, Tomaten und Petersilie. Mit Salat und Zitrone.

mains.name: Adana Kebab
mains.description: Hand-minced spiced lamb skewer grilled over charcoal, served with bulgur pilav, grilled vegetables, and our house yoghurt sauce.
mains.description_de: Handgehackter gewürzter Lammspieß vom Holzkohlegrill, mit Bulgurpilav, gegrilltem Gemüse und Joghurtsauce.

mains.name: İskender Kebab
mains.description: Döner meat sliced thin over crispy pide bread, drenched in hot tomato sauce and sizzling butter. Served with yoghurt. A Turkish classic.
mains.description_de: Dünn geschnittenes Dönerfleisch auf knusprigem Pide-Brot, übergossen mit heißer Tomatensauce und brutzelnder Butter. Mit Joghurt.

mains.name: Kuzu Tandır
mains.description: Slow-roasted leg of lamb (12 hours) in our clay oven, fall-off-the-bone tender. Served with roasted potatoes, seasonal vegetables, and rice.
mains.description_de: 12 Stunden langsam gebratene Lammkeule aus unserem Tonofen. Serviert mit Bratkartoffeln, Saisongemüse und Reis.

mains.name: Patlıcan Musakka
mains.description: Layers of oven-baked aubergine with minced beef, tomato sauce, and béchamel. A hearty Turkish classic.
mains.description_de: Überbackene Auberginen-Schichten mit Rinderhack, Tomatensauce und Béchamel. Ein herzhafter türkischer Klassiker.

mains.name: Sebzeli Güveç
mains.description: Slow-cooked clay pot stew of seasonal vegetables: aubergine, courgette, peppers, tomatoes, and chickpeas in a rich tomato-herb sauce.
mains.description_de: Langsam gegarter Tontopf-Eintopf aus Saisongemüse: Aubergine, Zucchini, Paprika, Tomaten und Kichererbsen in Kräuter-Tomatensauce.

mains.name: Tavuk Şiş
mains.description: Marinated chicken thigh skewers grilled over charcoal with peppers and onion. Served with rice pilav and cacık.
mains.description_de: Marinierte Hähnchenoberschenkel-Spieße vom Holzkohlegrill mit Paprika und Zwiebeln. Mit Reispilav und Cacık.

mains.name: Balık Tava
mains.description: Pan-fried sea bass fillet with garlic, lemon, capers, and fresh herbs. Served with roasted vegetables and bulgur.
mains.description_de: Gebratenes Wolfsbarschfilet mit Knoblauch, Zitrone, Kapern und frischen Kräutern. Mit geröstetem Gemüse und Bulgur.

mains.name: Karnıyarık
mains.description: Whole aubergine stuffed with spiced minced beef, pine nuts, currants, and herbs. Baked and served with rice.
mains.description_de: Ganze Aubergine gefüllt mit gewürztem Rinderhack, Pinienkernen, Korinthen und Kräutern. Gebacken, mit Reis.

mains.name: Falafel Teller
mains.description: House-made crispy falafel patties served with hummus, tabbouleh, pickled vegetables, and warm pide bread.
mains.description_de: Hausgemachte knusprige Falafel-Bällchen mit Hummus, Tabbouleh, eingelegtem Gemüse und warmem Pide-Brot.

mains.name: Mixed Grill Platte
mains.description: For two: Adana kebab, Tavuk şiş, köfte, lamb chop, grilled vegetables, rice, and salad. The full Bosphorus experience.
mains.description_de: Für zwei: Adana Kebab, Tavuk Şiş, Köfte, Lammkotelette, gegrilltes Gemüse, Reis und Salat.

desserts.name: Baklava
desserts.description: House-made filo pastry layered with crushed pistachios and walnuts, soaked in fragrant rose-water syrup. Served with kaymak cream.
desserts.description_de: Hausgemachte Yufka-Blätterteig-Schichten mit Pistazien und Walnüssen, getränkt in Rosenwasser-Sirup. Mit Kaymak-Creme.

desserts.name: Künefe
desserts.description: Warm shredded wheat pastry filled with melted white cheese, drenched in sweet syrup and topped with ground pistachios. Served immediately.
desserts.description_de: Warme Engelshaar-Teig-Pastete mit geschmolzenem Weißkäse, Sirup und Pistazien. Sofort serviert.
desserts.note: 15 minutes preparation time — worth the wait

desserts.name: Sütlaç
desserts.description: Traditional oven-baked rice pudding with a caramelised golden top, perfumed with vanilla and rose water. Served chilled.
desserts.description_de: Traditioneller ofengebackener Reispudding mit karamellisierter Oberfläche, Vanille und Rosenwasser. Kalt serviert.

desserts.name: Dondurma
desserts.description: Two scoops of traditional chewy Turkish ice cream. Choice of: pistachio, rose, mastic, or chocolate.
desserts.description_de: Zwei Kugeln traditionelles, zähes türkisches Eis. Auswahl: Pistazie, Rose, Mastix oder Schokolade.

desserts.name: Lokma
desserts.description: Light fluffy fried dough balls drizzled with honey syrup and dusted with cinnamon and sesame. A street food favourite.
desserts.description_de: Leichte, luftige gebratene Teigbällchen mit Honigsirup, Zimt und Sesam. Ein Straßenfood-Klassiker.

drinks.name: Çay
drinks.description: Classic Turkish black tea served in traditional tulip glasses. Unlimited refills.
drinks.description_de: Klassischer türkischer Schwarztee in traditionellen Tulpengläsern. Unbegrenzte Nachfüllungen.

drinks.name: Türkischer Kaffee
drinks.description: Traditional Turkish coffee prepared in a copper cezve. Choose: şekerli (sweet), az şekerli (slightly sweet), or sade (without sugar).
drinks.description_de: Traditioneller türkischer Kaffee aus dem Kupfer-Cezve. Wahl: süß, halbsüß oder ohne Zucker.

drinks.name: Ayran
drinks.description: Traditional cold yoghurt drink, lightly salted. The perfect companion to any grilled dish.
drinks.description_de: Traditionelles kaltes Joghurtgetränk, leicht gesalzen. Der perfekte Begleiter zu Grillgerichten.

drinks.name: Şalgam Suyu
drinks.description: Traditional fermented purple carrot and turnip juice, tangy and earthy. Mild or spicy.
drinks.description_de: Traditioneller fermentierter lila Möhren- und Rübensaft. Mild oder scharf.

drinks.name: Efes Bira
drinks.description: Classic Turkish lager. 500ml. Refreshing and light.

drinks.name: Hausgemachte Limonade
drinks.description: Fresh hand-squeezed lemonade with mint and ginger. Served over ice.
drinks.description_de: Frisch gepresste Limonade mit Minze und Ingwer. Mit Eis.

drinks.name: Wasser
drinks.description: Still or sparkling mineral water. 0.33L or 0.75L.

drinks.name: Raki
drinks.description: The iconic Turkish anise spirit. Served with water and ice — turns white on mixing. 4cl.
drinks.description_de: Der ikonische türkische Anisschnaps. Mit Wasser und Eis serviert. 4cl.

drinks.name: Rotwein / Weißwein
drinks.description: Curated Turkish wines. Ask your waiter for today's selection. Glass or bottle.
drinks.description_de: Ausgewählte türkische Weine. Fragen Sie Ihren Kellner nach der Tagesauswahl. Glas oder Flasche.

weekly.name: Kuzu Pirzola
weekly.description: Grilled rack of lamb with herb crust, pomegranate glaze, and seasonal vegetables. Friday only.

weekly.name: Brunch Mezze
weekly.description: Unlimited mezze brunch: hummus, börek, eggs, cheeses, olives, fresh bread, tea and coffee. Sunday 12:00–15:00.

specials.seasonal: Ask about our seasonal specials — we change them monthly based on the freshest ingredients.

private_events.description: Private dining room available for birthdays, corporate events, and celebrations. Set menus from €45 per person.

faq.question: Is the kitchen halal certified?
faq.answer: Yes. Our kitchen is fully halal certified. No pork products are used in any dish. Alcoholic beverages are available but served separately.

faq.question: Do you have vegan options?
faq.answer: Yes! Hummus, Çoban Salatası, Sebzeli Güveç, Falafel Teller, Lokma, Çay, Ayran (vegetarian), Şalgam Suyu, and Hausgemachte Limonade are vegan or vegan-friendly.

faq.question: Do you have gluten-free options?
faq.answer: Several dishes are naturally gluten-free, including Adana Kebab (without bread), Çoban Salatası, Sebzeli Güveç, and most grilled mains. Please inform your waiter of any allergies.

faq.question: Can I bring a birthday cake?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We can also arrange a cake for you — please give us 48 hours notice. We add a small €5 plate fee if you bring your own.

faq.question: Is there parking?
faq.answer: Public parking is available at Torstraße Parkhaus, a 3 minute walk. Tram M8/M10 stop is directly outside the restaurant.

faq.question: Do you offer group menus?
faq.answer: Yes. For groups of 8 or more, we recommend our set menus starting at €35 per person. Contact us at events@bosphorus-berlin.de.

faq.question: What happens if the restaurant is fully booked?
faq.answer: If we are fully booked, we will add you to our live waitlist. As soon as a table becomes available, we will notify you immediately via WhatsApp. You will have 15 minutes to confirm — if no reply, the table moves to the next person on the waitlist. We also suggest the nearest available alternative slot so you are never left without options.

faq.question: Where are you located?
faq.answer: Bosphorus Berlin is located at Torstraße 142, Berlin Mitte, 10119. We are in the heart of Mitte, directly on the tram M8/M10 stop. Public parking at Torstraße Parkhaus is a 3-minute walk.
